---
title: "Chansu Han, Ph.D."
page-layout: article
---

::: {.cv-header}
![](cv/assets/profile.jpg){.profile-photo width=200}

# Chansu Han, Ph.D.

**Researcher**, Center for Research on AI Security and Technology Evolution (CREATE),  
National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT), Japan

**Contact:** [han@nict.go.jp](mailto:han@nict.go.jp)

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZvvIWZ4AAAAJ&hl=en) ·
[ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Chansu-Han-2) ·
[dblp](https://dblp.org/pid/186/6829.html) ·
[Semantic Scholar](https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Chansu-Han/3467047) ·
[Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/K-3263-2019) ·
[ORCID: 0000-0002-1728-5300](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1728-5300) ·
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chansu-han-aa0857193/)
:::

Welcome. This site hosts my academic CV and a curated list of computer security conference deadlines.

- [**CV**](cv/index.qmd) — biography, publications, awards, and professional activities
- [**Conferences**](conferences/index.qmd) — submission deadlines and venue information

> Site under construction (Phase 0). Content is being migrated from [HackMD](https://hackmd.io/@gotchance/BJ7ACLZ0E).
